chatter.🐦 Social Sentiment:
**Mood: Chaotic Bullish with a Hawkish Shadow.** Twitter is losing its mind over today's $860B intraday swing — the biggest single-session reversal in months. Trump's Iran-talking-points sparked a massive gap-up, then a near-total wipeout, then a full recovery into the close.

**Top voices:**

> @dayxtrading: *"THIS IS INSANE VOLATILITY — $760B added, then $700B wiped, then $860B added back. 🤯"*

> @cryptorover: *"$500,000,000,000 added to US stocks in 5 minutes after open."*

> @CryptoNobler: *"🚨 9 OUT OF 12 FOMC MEMBERS SUPPORT A 25 BPS RATE HIKE IN JULY. Fed chair calling for hikes amid rising inflation and AI bubble fears. Bad for BTC and risk assets."*

> @SteveRattner: *"PCE inflation — the gauge behind the Fed."*

> @TFTC21: *"The Fed has printed 25-30% inflation and parked it like a battery on its balance sheet."*

**The vibe:** A split personality. Bulls are high-fiving over the wild recovery and Iran-de-escalation catalyst. But the FOMC-hawk narrative is building fast — and **that's the story that matters for the weeks ahead.**

---
chatter.📉 After-Hours Movers:
After-hours is quiet — the action all happened in the regular session. Key takeaways:

- **$SPY** — The 3%+ intraday reversal in the S&P was the headline event. Gapped up $760B on Iran news, nearly flushed the whole gain, then recovered to close up.
- **$NKE** — Earnings this week. Options flow showing elevated IV — positioning for a big move.
- **$STZ**, **$GIS** — Consumer staples earnings in a shortened week. Defensives could get rotation if the hawkish Fed narrative takes hold.
- **Macro tug of war:** Geopolitical optimism (Iran de-escalation) vs. hawkish Fed reality (July hike odds rising). That tension is keeping vol elevated into the close.

---
chatter.🔮 Next Day Setup:
**Event radar for Tuesday:**

- 📊 **PCE inflation data** — the Fed's preferred gauge. Any upside surprise validates the 25bps July hike chatter and hits risk assets.
- 🏢 **$NKE earnings** — bellwether for consumer health. A miss compounds the demand-worry narrative.
- 🇮🇷 **US-Iran talks follow-through** — any positive headline = risk-on, any breakdown = safe-haven bid.
- 📉 **Shortened 4-day week** — July 4th means thin liquidity. Moves will amplify.

**The big question:** Was today's $860B recovery a true **capitulation washout** with fresh institutional buying, or a **dead cat bounce** before the Fed reality sets in?

**Futures watch:** Pay close attention to overnight S&P and Nasdaq futures. If they hold gains into Tuesday's cash open, the bulls have momentum. A fade into pre-market = the hawkish Fed narrative wins.

**$BTC / crypto vulnerable** — if FOMC is truly 9-12 for a hike, risk-off rotation starts with the most speculative corners.

narrative.📅 Morning Briefing — Tuesday, June 30, 2:
---

### 🌍 Global Macro

**Mag 7 value shrinks by $2.3 trillion** as AI spending jitters rattle investors — though **chipmakers remain well bid**. Oil prices set for a **steep monthly drop** as Trump and Iran send mixed signals ahead of talks in Qatar. French biotech **Abivax surged 34%** on new drug data. Indonesia jailed its former education minister 10 years for a Chromebook graft case. And a top European central banker warns inflation will stay **"significantly above target"** for the foreseeable future.

---

### 🇺🇸 US Domestic

**Small-cap stocks** are notching their **best first half in 35 years** — a sharp reversal from years of large-cap dominance. Medicare will **start covering obesity drugs** (Wegovy, Zepbound) for seniors beginning July 1, unlocking a major new patient pool for Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly. A **memory stock is up eightfold** in 2026, with Bernstein calling for more gains. Premarket movers: AeroVironment, Strategy, and Merck.

---

### 💼 Business & Markets

A **79-year-old fashion retailer** shut 136 stores and killed a brand. **Gold hangs just above $4,000** with analysts eyeing further upside. **Oracle launched Fusion Agentic Applications** to automate supply chains with AI. ReElement Technologies and POSCO formed a **$200M JV** for US rare earth production. HSBC says the **AI trade could surprise to the upside** in H2, while Wells Fargo calls for a **summer rally**.

---

### 🔬 Science

Scientists may have cracked **how Alzheimer's spreads**: a common brain protein carries toxic Tau between neurons — blocking it could slow the disease. **Creatine shows promise against depression** by boosting brain energy. Tiny **soil microbes rescue crops from salty farmland** by strengthening roots with lignin. And astronomers confirmed two **super-puff planets less dense than cotton candy** — plus a rare glimpse of a black hole tearing apart a white dwarf.

---

### 🤖 Tech & AI

The **US offers $10 million** for intel on Russian state hackers targeting Signal and WhatsApp. **South Korea commits $1 trillion** to memory chips and humanoid robots, targeting commercial bots by 2028. **Solar outproduced coal** in April, marking a key renewable milestone. The Supreme Court **gutted geofence warrant** use by law enforcement. And **Sony deleted digital content** from user libraries — a stark reminder that digital purchases aren't ownership.

---

### 📊 Market Impact Summary

**Verdict:** Cautious but not bearish. The Mag 7 sell-off sets a mixed open, but **small-cap rotation** and a **broadening rally** suggest healthy market churn, not panic.

- **Sectors to watch:** Semis (well-bid despite AI scrutiny), **Healthcare** (Medicare GLP-1 catalyst), **Gold** ($4K+ signals macro uncertainty), **Energy** (under pressure from sliding oil)
- **Key event ahead:** US–Iran talks in **Doha on Tuesday** — could set oil direction for the rest of the quarter.

Markets enter H2 with momentum from a stellar first half, but AI spending scrutiny and sticky inflation create genuine crosscurrents.
